subcodes.first_line: My God, my Beloved! I humbly entreat Thee, with my heart and my soul, to sanctify me from all love but the love of Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و محبوبی انی اتضرع بروحی و فوادی ان تقدسنی من حب غیرک و تطهرنی عن التعلق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
